title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kinemon, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Wano Citizens, Orochi as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Preparations to poison every last one of the crafty Daimyo that stood in his way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One after another, these shown complained of internal strife, and then disap-peared.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sight of his Daimyo dropping like flies worried the Shogun,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: and eventually he fell ill too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The plan was nearly complete! And just when the world itself was within reach...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He was born. An heir!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Sukiyaki Kozuki!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Accursed Sukiyaki! Not only were the Kurozumi unable to take over wano, their plan was revealed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your grandfather was forced to commit Hara-Kiri, and your house was disbanded! Its lands, castle, and status, all stolen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: left with nothing, the Kurozumi name was slandered by the people,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And your people were forced out onto the street!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So who is to blame for the destitute life you now lead?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Whose fault is it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The one of ill birth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Krash! Vodm VoOM!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Sukiyaki Kozuki!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes! If he had not been born, you would have been shogun one day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Indeed! Accursed Sukiyaki! Fell Suki- Yaki!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ARE YOU... A KUROZUM-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It matters not who I am!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have been abroad for many, many years. I have labored long and hard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look at my face.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wha-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Nnikyokyo Kyokyo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: KShai

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Whaaaa?! That's my face!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the power of a fruit known as the clone-close fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If you heed my words...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will give you power. Enough power to become Shogun yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll do whatever it takes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Gather money. Produce weapons.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: The artisans of Wano are quite skilled...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That talent can forge you formidable support!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My name's Orochi. My family all died to illness, and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry to hear that. You can work here.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Orochi's gone?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes! And this may be a coincidence, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The money in our Treasury's All Gone, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the kid that was at Yasu's castle!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: The name's Orochi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could never ask Lord Yasuie, to whom I owe so much, for money, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I see. I got it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: PLEASE! Give me some money!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Again?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Please! Give me some money!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Again?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've finally got a way to pay you back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Please, some money!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Retainers
dialogue.text: Lord Oden!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He promised me he'll pay it back, this time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oden?! What's the matter, all of a sudden! You haven't even brought any of your retainers with you!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 52 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
